page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.small is an entry-level virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features a single dedicated vCPU from an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 2.0 GB of system memory, with no bundled local storage or GPU resources. The CPU supports several instruction set extensions, including AVX, AVX512F, and AVX512_VNNI, alongside AES cryptography acceleration.

In benchmark evaluations, the instance demonstrates performance characteristics that place it in the lower tier of cloud resources. Stress-ng single-core and multi-core CPU tests yielded a score of 1026.39, while the Passmark CPU score reached 1291.58. Memory performance is similarly constrained, with a read-only small block bandwidth of 76.38 GB/sec and an uncached large block read bandwidth of 8.4 GB/sec. Database operations and web serving throughput are modest, with Redis SET operations executing at 1.35 million operations per second and static web serving throughput reaching 0.91 GB/sec.

Given its minimal resource footprint and lower-tier benchmark results, this instance represents a highly cost-efficient option for workloads with low resource demands. It is best suited for lightweight utility tasks, basic web serving, development environments, and simple background processes that do not require high computational throughput or local storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.small is an entry-level, KVM-based virtual server configured with a single dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY vCPU running at 2.5 GHz and 2.0 GB of RAM. It features an x86_64 architecture with support for AVX-512 instructions, but does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. Benchmark results place this instance in the lower performance tier, with a Passmark CPU score of 1291.58 and a static web serving throughput of 0.91 GB/sec. Due to its limited resource allocation and low-tier performance profile, it offers a highly cost-effective solution for lightweight workloads. It is best suited for basic web serving, development sandboxes, and simple background utility tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.small is an entry-level virtual server featuring 1 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPU, 2.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, designed for lightweight utility workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.small is an entry-level KVM instance with 1 Intel Xeon vCPU and 2.0 GB RAM, ideal for basic utility tasks.
tagline: A minimal, budget-friendly virtual server with a single dedicated processor and two gigabytes of memory for basic utility workloads.

2.0 GB of system memory with no bundled local storage
Supports AVX-512 and AES hardware-accelerated instructions
KVM hypervisor-based virtualization on x86_64 architecture
